programme.title: Relic Hunter: Vampires Kiss
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Errors of the Human Body
programme.desc: When a potentially lethal virus is created within his new lab, Dr Geoff Burton is shocked to discover he is not only the unwitting cause, but also its first victim.

programme.title: Crazy Kind Of Love
programme.desc: A broken family finds their relationships to one another changed by a new arrival in the household.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: After his transfer request to stay stateside is approved, a lieutenant in the National Guard faces a dilemma: one of his soldiers looks to go AWOL as their unit gears up for deployment to Iraq.

programme.title: Seconds Apart
programme.desc: Twin brothers with psychic rage turn on each other when one falls in love

programme.title: More Beautiful For Having Been Broken
programme.desc: A female FBI agent befriends a woman and her adorable, young, special needs son who live in the countryside. The women's friendship soon turns into romance but family secrets complicate things.

programme.title: Christmas Angel
programme.desc: Ashley feels alone this Christmas as she searches fruitlessly for a job to support herself and her dog, Dash. But her neighbor Nick knows exactly what to do. He offers her a job as his assistant in the best work of all----helping others. There's only one catch: Ashley can't tell anyone that her boss is a sort of Secret Santa. When a nosy reporter, Will, takes interest in Ashley, she struggles to keep Nick's secret while protecting her heart.

programme.title: Uncle Nino
programme.desc: Overworked executive Robert Micelli has little time for his family that has become disconnected from one another. When Robert's long-lost Uncle Nino unexpectedly arrives on their doorstep from Italy for a visit, Nino's simple, old-fashioned ways help the Micelli's discover the joy of La Famiglia.

programme.title: Timeless Love
programme.desc: Megan seems to have the perfect life with a wonderful husband named Thomas and 2 adorable children. Then she finds herself awakening from a coma – and discovers she is not and has never been married. But when she meets Thomas for real, she seizes the chance to help him fall in love with her, again—for the first time.

programme.title: Belle and the Beast
programme.desc: Eric Landry is a cold-hearted man that people have nicknamed "the Beast." Years of anger and bitterness have consumed him, turning him into a selfish man. But Belle Watson is the exact opposite. When her father accidentally breaks a valuable work of art at the Landry mansion, Belles agrees to work for Eric in an effort to repay him and save her father's job. She discovers there just might be more to Eric. Will she find the man within the Beast?

programme.title: Heaven Is Waiting
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: Guns Of The Revolution
programme.desc: In Mexico, a mad general is leading his own war against the Church.

programme.title: Molly And Lawless John
programme.desc: In New Mexico, a sheriff's unhappy mid-aged wife aids a condemned prisoner escape her husband's jail and elopes with the young and attractive outlaw to Mexico, pursued by the sheriff's posse.

programme.title: More Dead Than Alive
programme.desc: Released from prison after 18 years, notorious gunslinger 'Killer' Cain is a peaceful reformed man but the Old West has died and he cannot adapt to the modern West where some unpaid moral debts and old troubles resurface.

programme.title: To Hell and Gone
programme.desc: A crafty drifter crosses paths with a gang of murderous thieves in the middle of nowhere, AZ.

programme.title: Finding Mrs. Claus
programme.desc: When Mrs. Claus (Mira Sorvino) feels neglected by her less than attentive husband (Will Sasso), she goes to Las Vegas to help a little girl with her Christmas wish.

programme.title: Looks Like Christmas
programme.desc: From cooking to decorating, Carol sleeps and breathes Christmas, so it's no wonder the town refers to her as “Christmas Carol”.

programme.title: Falling in Love at Christmas
programme.desc: Miranda and Paul, two rivals, meet on a costumed Santa crawl and spend a romantic evening together without learning each other's identities. As their anonymous romance continues online, their businesses merge, forcing them into an unwanted partnership.

programme.title: Christmas Wish
programme.desc: When Paula chose Gary over Nick, 15 years later she'd be married, with tons of debt. At Christmas, when Nick reappears, now a rich, successful art broker. A little Christmas magic and she is transported to the life with Nick.

programme.title: Baghead
programme.desc: Four actors go to a cabin in the woods for the weekend to write a movie script. They talk about a relationship movie or a paper bag over the head movie. It starts with an anonymous baghead and slowly escalates.

programme.title: Bringing Up Bobby
programme.desc: A con artist moves her son to a conservative neighborhood in Oklahoma in an effort to build a better future, but it doesn't take long for her past to catch up with her, and for her son's behavior to cause problems of its own.

programme.title: Strangerland
programme.desc: Two teenagers disappear into the desert sparking disturbing rumours as their parents frantically search for them.

programme.title: The Light Of Western Stars
programme.desc: Cowhand Ladd dances with cantina girl Estrella and has a part in shooting Sheriff Tyler.

programme.title: Beeing Kegan
programme.desc: The plot centers around a tormented naval officer who, when he returns home to Liverpool, is forced to confront a traumatic childhood event as the city becomes a landscape for his atonement.

programme.title: Eternally Yours
programme.desc: Anita Halstead, swept off her feet by magician Arturo, finds the results less than magical.

programme.title: The Plague At The Karatas Village
programme.desc: A new mayor comes to the remote village Karatas. A very strange illness reins over here. However somebody is used to live with it and says this is a simple flu.

programme.title: The Amazing Adventure
programme.desc: A bored millionaire wagers his doctor that he can support himself at a working class job for year without touching his inheritance.

programme.title: Wishful Thinking
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic has an unexpected visitor who can magically make his dreams come true.

programme.title: Memento Mori
programme.desc: Paul, who, after coming out of the hospital to perform a Series of tests, is told by his doctor that he only has a few more days to live. Devastated by this news, he decides to hit the roads of France.

programme.title: La Tierra Llamando A Ana
programme.desc: The story of a love, of a home, the story of Ana and Juan. The film also Features an amazing original composition written by the director.

programme.title: Have Wine, Will Travel
programme.desc: Betty is fighting a hangover. In between morning sips of wine, she finds herself entangled with three strangers claiming to be time travelers. As the travelers work to fix their malfunctioning gear, Betty talks up her own problems and works through her own life malfunctions.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Volume 1
programme.desc: Four years after taking a bullet in the head at her own wedding, The Bride emerges from a coma and decides it's time for payback…with a vengeance!

programme.title: Homefront
programme.desc: A former DEA agent struggling with the death of his wife moves with his young daughter to a new town, but his hopes for a quiet life are soon dashed when he becomes involved in a bitter row with a local drug dealer.

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: The true story of army medic and conscientious objector Desmond Doss who, during WWII, saved 75 men without firing or carrying a gun.

programme.title: Gods Not Dead
programme.desc: College philosophy professor Mr. Radisson's curriculum is challenged by his new student, Josh, who believes God exists. Starring:Shane Harper, Kevin Sorbo, David A.R. White

programme.title: Blue World Order
programme.desc: The film is set in a post-apocalyptic world in which civilisation has crumbled. A massive electromagnetic pulse has killed all children on the planet with the exception of Molly (Billie Rutherford), the daughter of Jake Slater (Jake Ryan).

programme.title: Errors of the Human Body
programme.desc: When a potentially lethal virus is created within his new lab, Dr Geoff Burton is shocked to discover he is not only the unwitting cause, but also its first victim.

programme.title: Armageddon Tales
programme.desc: After surviving a worldwide pandemic, two men with different agendas, two women from a survival colony, and a young girl and a man all form alliances as they cross post-apocalyptic landscapes.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: A Husband For Christmas
programme.desc: Two co-workers agree to a marriage of convenience, but an unrealized chemistry grows between them.

programme.title: Anatomy of Deception
programme.desc: A district attorney who, tapped to replace the outgoing mayor, is stalked by a man who engineers her fall from grace, leading her to push back and beat him at his own game.

programme.title: Mediator
programme.desc: A family counselor in the missing children's division becomes a mediator between the living and the missing.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori is cooking for girls night and must figure out how to please both of her friends!

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: I Met a Girl
programme.desc: An aspiring musician embarks on an epic, cross-country journey to find the woman of his dreams - who may be all in his head.

programme.title: The Big Wedding
programme.desc: With an all-star cast led by Robert DeNiro, Katherine Heigl, Diane Keaton, Amanda Seyfried with Susan Sarandon and Robin Williams, THE BIG WEDDING is an romantic comedy about a charmingly modern family trying to survive a weekend wedding celebration that has the potential to become a family fiasco.

programme.title: About Us
programme.desc: A young couple revisit the location where they spent their honeymoon eight years earlier, in an effort to rekindle their troubled marriage. We watch as they navigate the beauty and the pain of love, culminating in a heartbreaking finale as truths are revealed.

programme.title: Blind
programme.desc: Bestselling novelist, Bill Oakland loses his wife and his sight in a vicious car crash. Five years later Socialite Suzanne Dutchman is forced to read to Bill in an intimate room three times a week as a plea bargain for being associated with her husband's insider trading.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: A Foreign Officer in London is forced to go on the run when she is framed for crimes she did not commit.

programme.title: London Heist
programme.desc: Your enemies are closer than you think.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: A Foreign Officer in London is forced to go on the run when she is framed for crimes she did not commit.

programme.title: The Contractor
programme.desc: Elizabeth is remodeling her home and hires a contractor. Soon she learns he'd targeted the family all along.

programme.title: Tangerine
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in Tinseltown and Sin-Dee (Kitana Kiki Rodriguez) is back on the block. Upon hearing that her pimp boyfriend (James Ransone) hasn't been faithful during the 28 days she was locked up, the working girl and her best friend, Alexandra (Mya Taylor), embark on a mission to get to the bottom of the scandalous rumour. Their rip-roaring odyssey leads them through various subcultures of Los Angeles, including an Armenian family dealing with their own repercussions of infidelity.

programme.title: How to Ruin the Holidays
programme.desc: A festive family caper starring Amber Nash (Archer, Mr. Robot) as a struggling comedian who reluctantly returns home for Christmas. Upon her arrival, she must not only deal with her eccentric and wildly dysfunctional family, but ultimately has a life-changing decision to make about her father and special-needs brother.

programme.title: The Nights Before Christmas
programme.desc: In this Christmas set horror, a pair of crazed killers have written a very special 'naughty' list of targets. You better watch out, as now they've checked it twice, all sorts of festive hell is about to break loose! When a series of murders in the run up to Christmas are found to be linked, FBI Special Agent Natalie Parker is tasked with tracking a pair of psychotic serial killers. But she soon discovers the couple are not only crazy, having met in and escaped from an asylum for the criminally insane, but have based their personas on Santa and Mrs Claus. As Christmas approaches, they slaughter their way through their special naughty list, playing a cat and mouse game with the FBI and leaving a trail of gruesome bloody bodies in their wake.

programme.title: Tangerine
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in Tinseltown and Sin-Dee (Kitana Kiki Rodriguez) is back on the block. Upon hearing that her pimp boyfriend (James Ransone) hasn't been faithful during the 28 days she was locked up, the working girl and her best friend, Alexandra (Mya Taylor), embark on a mission to get to the bottom of the scandalous rumour. Their rip-roaring odyssey leads them through various subcultures of Los Angeles, including an Armenian family dealing with their own repercussions of infidelity.

programme.title: Christmas Reservations
programme.desc: She plans every event and keeps all the guests happy.

programme.title: Dear Christmas
programme.desc: Natalie Morgan's Holiday Love podcast explores real holiday romances.

programme.title: Eve's Christmas
programme.desc: Busy ad executive on the brink of partnership rethinks her life choices.

programme.title: Christmas Reservations
programme.desc: She plans every event and keeps all the guests happy.

programme.title: Savage
programme.desc: Snowed in, no way out and cut off from the world atop a mountain, a lone police officer must hold out until his transfer arrives. One routine day soon turns into a fight for survival, in this stylish action-packed thriller as a group of armed thieves arrive at the door. Seeking shelter, theyre not taking no for an answer. Its kill or be killed and theres nowhere to run. A must watch!

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers
programme.desc: From the mind of Bret Easton Ellis (American Psycho) comes an all-new terrifying killer tale. When a murderous cult arrives on campus, Jake (Ronan Rubenstein, Orange is the New Black) finds himself plagued with mysterious messages that lead him and his friends down the rabbit hole towards murder and mayhem. Jake must decide if the cryptic messages are a prank or if his life is truly at risk.

programme.title: The Culling
programme.desc: When a group of college friends head out of town for a fun-filled long weekend, their plans change after finding a 7-year-old girl alone at an empty cafe along the highway and have no choice but to drive her home. When they arrive at her house it's quickly apparent they will have to stay the night - but what's not apparent is the living nightmare that they're about to encounter.

programme.title: Hell Is Where The Home Is
programme.desc: Two couples renting a luxury home in the desert are thrust into chaos when a mysterious woman arrives, claiming car trouble and refusing to leave.

programme.title: Finding Father Christmas
programme.desc: A woman who was orphaned at a young age discovers a clue that leads her back to her father. Can she reunite her family in time for Christmas? Stars Erin Krakow, Niall Matter (2016)

programme.title: Holiday Wish Come True
programme.desc: Two sisters' only wish is to spend the holidays as a family, forcing their divorced parents to work out their issues and find love again. Starring Schuyler Fisk (2018)

programme.title: The Last Christmas Home
programme.desc: The Marvin sisters gather for what may be their last Christmas at their childhood home. Starring Erin Cahill (2018)

programme.title: Northpole
programme.desc: Santa's magical home is losing its charm as people everywhere are too busy to enjoy Christmas.

programme.title: On The Twelfth Day Of Christmas
programme.desc: When she learns her long-time crush has lost his love for Christmas, Maggie tries her best to revive his holiday spirit. Stars Brooke Nevin, Robin Dunne (2015)

programme.title: Written in The Stars
programme.desc: A journalist teams up with an astrology guru to write about a local meteor shower festival where they discover that love can be written in the stars. Starring Kimberley Crossman (2021)

programme.title: A Bride For Christmas
programme.desc: Jessie has vowed to avoid serious relationships, while Aiden needs someone to agree to marry him by Christmas to win a bet. But will the magic of Christmas ultimately lead them to true love? (2012)

programme.title: The Vows We Keep
programme.desc: With less than a month to go, an event planner must organize the perfect wedding for her sister. Starring Fiona Gubelmann (2021)

programme.title: I Married Who?
programme.desc: Jordan heads to Las Vegas for her hen night. But panic sets-in when she wakes up holding a wedding certificate and discovering she is the subject of mass media interest. Who did she marry? (2012)

programme.title: Wedding at Graceland
programme.desc: Christmas at Graceland brought high school sweethearts back together. Clay and Laurel are back to plan their wedding, but will the in-law's differences pull them apart? (2019)

programme.title: Three Hats for Lisa
programme.desc: A gorgeous continental film star comes to London for the premiere of her latest film and is whisked away by her number one fan, a Cockney docker and his three friends.

programme.title: THE DIVORCE OF LADY X
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier plays Logan, a divorce lawyer, stranded in overcrowded hotel.

programme.title: FLOODS OF FEAR
programme.desc: The Humbolt River is bursting its banks and flooding the American town of Lebannon. Three men cling to the wreckage of a dyke and one, Donovan, rescues Elizabeth, a young girl trapped near her home.

programme.title: THE PRIVATE LIFE OF HENRY VIII
programme.desc: In this oscar winning performace, Charles Laughton plays Henry VIII.

programme.title: MAKE MINE MINK
programme.desc: A group of people lead by Major Rayne (Terry Thomas), hatch a plan to steal fur coats, sell them and give the money to charity. As a group, however, they are not particularly experienced in such matters.

programme.title: Nine Bullets
programme.desc: Gypsy Moon (Lena Headey – Games of Thrones) is a novelist by day and when night falls, she dances to earn her keep.

programme.title: Reprisal
programme.desc: This gritty, action-packed crime thriller pairs action legends Bruce Willis and Frank Grillo in a chilling tale of justice and revenge. After surviving a brutal bank robbery, Jacob teams with his ex-cop neighbor to track down the ruthless thief and avenge the assault...

programme.title: Conspiracy
programme.desc: After a former Special Operations United States Marine gets wounded during combat in Iraq, MacPherson (Kilmer) reluctantly agrees to join a fellow soldier at his Arizona ranch. But when MacPherson arrives, his friend has mysteriously disappeared and no one will admit to knowing him.

programme.title: The Ghost
programme.desc: Britain's former PM is holed up in a remote, ocean-front house in America, struggling to finish his memoirs, when his long-term assistant drowns. A professional ghostwriter is sent to rescue the project.

programme.title: Starship Troopers 2: Hero Of The Federation
programme.desc: A small group of troopers find themselves taking refuge in an abandoned outpost as they attempt to fight the encroaching arachnids - not realizing that a much graver danger is actually infiltrating their unit.

programme.title: Starship Troopers 3: Marauder
programme.desc: Johnny Rico is now a general, and called back into action to defeat the bugs.

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
programme.desc: A legendary warrior leads the last remaining free Indian tribe against U.S. Army forces intent on their subjugation.

programme.title: Nowhere To Run
programme.desc: Action star Jean-Claude Van Damme is an escaped convict hiding out in a widow's (Rosanna Arquette) farm. When a land developer tries to force Arquette off her land in order to complete a multimillion dollar real estate deal, Van Damme steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: STRIPES is a hilarious film with Bill Murray as an irresponsible goof-off who has just lost his job, his girl, his apartment and his car. As he ponders his fate, it occurs to him that enlisting in the Army seems to be a sensible career move. He persuades his friend to join him and soon they find themselves in boot camp surrounded by misfits.

programme.title: The Freshman (1990)

This cast includes Marlon Brando, Matthew Broderick, Maximilian Schell, Bruno Kirby, Penelope Ann Miller, Frank Whaley and Paul Benedict.

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times

His ex-wife, Goldie Hawn, is a liberal lawyer married to the local district attorney. When Chase arrives at their home seeking shelter, she takes him in and their passions are rekindled.

programme.title: Spring Break

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: The Heirs of the Knights Templar
programme.desc: The Freemasons are the secret brotherhood with the most members. More than four million followers regularly gather in their temples and lodges. Their fundamental ideals are liberty, equality, fraternity, tolerance and humanity. It is because of their rituals, some of them bizarre, and their self-imposed secrecy that there are still conspiracy theories about this secret order.

programme.title: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Secret Societies - The Code of the Illuminati: Since Dan Brown's bestselling novel ‘Angels & Demons', the secret society of the Illuminati has been known to millions. Founded in Ingolstadt in May 1776, the secret society was committed to changing the prevailing systems. The founder, Adam Weishaupt, was a renowned philosopher and theologian who didn't just fight against the oppressive dogmas of the church, but also against the totalitarian forms of government that existed at the time.

programme.title: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Secret Societies - The Masks of the Conspirators: Did the Americans really manage to land on the Moon in the 1960s? Or was this ground-breaking event staged in the desert of Nevada? Were the people behind the 9/11 attacks really fanatical Muslims or did the American government play a part? Could Jesus have had descendants, as some authors speculate? The history of humankind is full of conspiracy theories.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: How did the ancient myth of the vampire emerge? When did the first “vampire epidemic” break out? And who inspired Bram Stoker to write his famous novel “Dracula”? Yet vampires made headlines long before Stoker's novel was published. The fear of the undead returning from their graves striking terror into people's hearts is as old as the world.

programme.title: Monsters and Myths
programme.desc: Monsters have always been part of our nightmares and fairy tales. But where do they actually come from? How much of them is truth, how much is myth? Going to great lengths in this documentary, the filmmakers join scientists to explore a number of the best known sagas and legends in the world.

programme.title: Crime Scene Eulau
programme.desc: This documentary focuses on a spectacular discovery made in a quarry near the village of Eulau, not far from the central German town of Naumburg. Neolithic graves contained the skeletons of three women, two men and eight children, buried tenderly 4500 years ago, some affectionately entwined. In 2008, for the first time anywhere in the world, it was possible to perform a DNA analysis on the earliest evidence of the existence of a nuclear family. This was a sensation - but why did these people all die at the same time? Were they the victims of a violent crime? Who were they, and how did this terrible drama unfold? Archaeologists insist that these victims will not be forgotten, since these days it is possible to do far more than simply date and record such finds. Modern scientific methods have revolutionised archaeology, enabling us to discover how and why the family from Eulau in the German state of Sachsen-Anhalt died 4500 years ago. By enlisting the help of a CID profiler, archaeologists and anthropologists employ state-of-the-art analytical methods to investigate this Stone Age crime. In the process we discover key information about an era before recorded history which has previously been shrouded in mystery - and astonishing information about the composition of the population here also comes to light. It seems that the third millennium before Christ saw two major waves of migration, from Eastern and Western Europe, which determine the composition of the population here. In the middle of what is now Germany these two migratory movements met. Could this be the background to the mysterious murders of Eulau?

programme.title: World War A
programme.desc: Scientists are already looking feverishly for evidence of extraterrestrial life. With the ExoMars mission, ESA will soon find life on Mars. If there are only tiny microbes, there could also be life in other places in the universe. But can life in space exist at all? The exobiologist Jean-Pierre de Vera collects microorganisms around the world and tests them in his Mars simulation laboratory. Can they survive under the deadly conditions of Mars? Researchers believe there are planets on which alien life can exist. In 1991 the Swiss astrophysicist Michel Mayor discovered the world's first exoplanet. Since then, about 3,000 planets have been detected outside our solar system. Heike Rauer from the German Aerospace Center is looking for habitable planets. Will she find a second earth? The European Southern Observatory is also searching for life in space, building the largest telescope in the world. In the next 20 years the E-ELT should be able to prove the existence of life on distant planets. How would extraterrestrials look? Some scientists suspect that they may well resemble us humans. Under other environmental conditions, alien life could also arise completely differently. It could be formed from methane and silicon. Different gravity would form alien bodies completely differently. Could extraterrestrials send us messages? At the SETI Institute in California, alien hunters like Seth Shostak are listening to signals from alien civilizations. But mere listening is no longer enough. Some SETI researchers now want to send messages to the aliens themselves. They hope to finally get an answer. But would that be a bad idea? Many scientists warn of the dangers of establishing contact. The former SETI researcher and science fiction author David Brin also fears that it could be a devastating mistake. With well-meant news we could end up attracting attention from hostile civilizations. Should we really tell them that we exist and where they can find us?

programme.title: Little Matters: Insects
programme.desc: "Insects little matters" reveals many of these animals secrets, from the hunting traps of the antlion, that have inspired the best movie monsters, to the different kind of methamorphosis that avoids competition between parents and sons. We will admire termite environment control in their fungi farms, or the wild world´s longest copula of the stick insects, that remains during the whole period of gestation...

programme.title: The Peninsula

programme.title: Seasons Of The Otter
programme.desc: Most of the life of an otter goes unseen following a young otter family we'll reveal the secrets of the otter's world.

programme.title: Mega Nature
programme.desc: The largest animals are some of the most awe-inspiring, but when smaller species come together their combined forces can be even greater.

programme.title: Ice Dogs
programme.desc: Conditions in the High Arctic are too extreme for either man or dog to survive alone but together we have become native to the vast white expanses. Here dogs became our greatest allies. They're our eyes, ears, strength and stamina our closest connection to a wild and unforgiving nature. In this magical yet unforgiving land, the enduring bond between human and canine goes beyond friendship to total mutual dependence. As one of the oldest breeds in the world, Greenland dogs are celebrated as the pinnacle of high performance and endurance in polar regions.

programme.title: Animal Record Breakers
programme.desc: We love to measure aspects of life at its extremes. The biggest, the tallest, even the rarest – some of the most iconic creatures in the natural world. Many are familiar but it's also important to recognise some of the more surprising record breakers.

programme.title: Little Matters: Insects

programme.title: The Peninsula

programme.title: North America's National Parks
programme.desc: Olympic National Park is an American national park located in the State of Washington, on the Olympic Peninsula. The park has four regions: the Pacific coastline, alpine areas, the west side temperate rainforest and the forests of the drier east side. Within the park there are three distinct ecosystems which are subalpine forest and wildflower meadow, temperate forest, and the rugged Pacific coast. President Theodore Roosevelt originally designated Mount Olympus National Monument on 2 March 1909. The monument was redesignated as a national park by Congress and President Franklin Roosevelt on June 29, 1938. In 1976, Olympic National Park was designated by UNESCO as an International Biosphere Reserve, and in 1981 as a World Heritage Site. In 1988, Congress designated 95 percent of the park as the Olympic Wilderness. (S1 E07)

programme.title: North America's National Parks
programme.desc: Yosemite National Park is a place of superlatives: with towering cliffs and giant sequoias, home to coyotes, black bears and the most elusive of all: the bobcat. Watch this documentary with ist spectacular shots, aerial views and time-lapse shots and learn some new facts about the biodiversity in one of North Americas most spectacular National Parks. (S1 E08)

programme.title: Wilderness in Europe: The Bohemian Forest
programme.desc: The Bohemian Forest is the source of the Vltava River, home to primeval forests, untouched high moors and bubbling torrents. This archaic stretch of land, which includes the Bavarian Forest, was long considered impenetrable and mysterious. Since the fall of the Iron Curtain, Bavarian border residents have rediscovered new references to this unusual forest landscape for themselves. This is also the case with photo artist Bastian Kalous, who has been documenting his homeland for years with nostalgic-looking Polaroid photographs and is dealing with its eventful history for an illustrated book. Or Elisa Belotti and Marco Heurich, who have dedicated their lives to the lynxes. In order for Europe's largest wild cat to survive in the Bohemian Forest, the lynx researchers fight for every single animal. Iryna Rudenko came to Zwiesel from Ukraine out of a passion for glass as a material to study at the glass school. After graduation, she would like to stay in Bavaria, Anna Hones grew up in Horská Kvilda, the smallest and highest village in the Czech Republic. The village lies just under 1100 meters above sea level, directly on the former border. The farmer, who experienced communism, the fall of the Iron Curtain and the subsequent changes, is now trying to find ways of surviving in this barren region with her children. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Dust And Stripes
programme.desc: In a never-ending quest for grass and water, the striped herds undertake an annual epic trek across the vast lunar landscape of the Kalahari's Makgadikgadi Pans. Most of the year, the Makgadikgadi is an inhospitable wasteland of windswept, salt-encrusted pans. For the area's water-dependent zebra, the Boteti River on the western edge of the pans is a dry-season lifeline. However, it is also a death trap, with lions waiting in ambush and crocodiles lurking in dark riverside caves.

programme.title: King of the Seas
programme.desc: The times where eagles have been seen as varmints are over. They are now perceived as an integral part of the food cycle. Due to the fact that the habitats of the sea eagles in Germany are largely found in the north-eastern regions that are rich in water, the movie accompanies the eagles to an island, home to hundreds of sea ravens, where they rob the baby sea ravens of their food. They seem to always profit from the successes of the fellow creatures in their habitats. This film introduces you to the expert poachers of the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Masai Mara: The Big Hunt
programme.desc: When food supply in the Serengeti dwindles, the Masai Mara is a paradise for predators. As the black wildebeests, gazelles, zebras and antelopes make their yearly trip from the south of the Serengeti to the north, nature's best laid trap, the Mara River in Kenya is waiting ahead. Captivating shots filmed under water show how crocodiles prepare for the Big Hunt while other predators lurk on the banks awaiting their bounty. The biggest problems for the migratory animals are the Mara and the Tarek River, where they have to put their lives at risk to get to the other side. A great number of them die as they jump into the river and break their legs, while others are carried away by the drift or drown. Those who are not victims of the river itself risk falling prey to the crocodiles. We entered this unchartered territory, the crocodile domain by heading under water. Follow these predators in and around their habitat and watch prides of lions map out their game plan. In slow-motion, we show you the final showdown between predator and prey. Will it be a successful hunt or will the hoofed animals persevere?

programme.title: The Dying King
programme.desc: In the open wilderness of Africa, there are only 20.000 lions living a free life. In the last decade, humans have killed hundreds of thousands– mostly for purely hunting purposes. In the last couple of years, a new industry has developed called the canned hunting, where animals are bred for 4-5 years then released into a confined area. This confined area is created for the sole purpose optimizing the odds of the hunter obtaining a kill. The corpse of the dead, often male, lion is thereby treated as a trophy. Tourists pay up to 40, 000 USD for this 'privilege'.
